descFields.name: Name
descFields.nameTooltip: The name of the exhibition that will be displayed when viewing the exhibition.
descFields.nameChapterTooltip: The title of the chapter that will appear in the center of the screen and in the list of chapters when browsing the exhibition.
descFields.nameScreenTooltip: The name of the screen that will be displayed to the visitor in the bar for the text version. The name will also appear as the name of the screens in the list of all screens in the edit. If you do not fill it, the screen type will remain listed as the name of the screen.
descFields.subnameTooltip: Addendum or subtitle to the title of the exhibition. There is no need to fill it out.
descFields.subnameChapterToolip: Additional or explanatory title of the chapter, which will be displayed under the main title in the middle of the screen.
descFields.perexTooltip: Text introducing the exhibition after clicking the 'More information' button on the start screen. It is displayed before the exhibition starts.
descFields.charCount: characters, estimated length of the spoken word:
descFields.backgroundImageTooltip: An image from the document library that will be displayed in the background of the opening screen of the exhibition. The image can be supplemented with motion animation.
descFields.imageAnimationTooltip: Select the type of background image animation or choose no animation.
descFields.expoAudioTooltip: Link to the audio file, which represents the audio version of the entire exhibition. The visitor can download the complete audio version of the exhibition on the opening page of the exhibition.
descFields.audioScreenTrackTooltip: Upload background music or an audio version of the commentary here, or a commentary combined with music for this screen. The visitor can turn off the sound while viewing the exhibition.
descFields.audioChapterTrackTooltip: Upload the background music here to play in a loop while viewing all the screens in this chapter.
descFields.expoDurationTooltip: Estimated duration of the exhibition to inform the visitor.
descFields.screenTimeTooltip: It is not possible to set the display length manually on this screen, it is automatically calculated based on the settings in the Sequence section.
descFields.automaticScreenTime: Automatically according to the spoken word
descFields.manualScreenTime: Manually set the time for each photo
descFields.organizationTooltip: The institution that created the exhibition.
descFields.organizationLinkTooltip: Link to the website of the institution that created the exhibition.
descFields.textTooltip: Supplementary text on a topic providing information and explanation to the visitor.
descFields.gameNameTooltip: The name of the screen that will be displayed to the visitor in the bar for the text version. The name will also appear as the name of the screens in the list of all screens in the edit. If you do not fill it, the screen type will remain listed as the name of the screen.

introScreen.imageBoxTooltip: An image from the document library that will be displayed in the background of the chapter splash screen. The image can be accompanied by a motion animation.
introScreen.imageAnimationTooltip: Choose from several types of background image animation.
introScreen.imageAnimationWithoutNoCrop: No animation and no image cropping

imageScreen.imageBoxTooltip: An image from the document library that will be displayed in the background of the chapter splash screen. The image can be accompanied by a motion animation.
imageScreen.imageAnimationTooltip: Choose from several types of background image animation.

videoScreen.videoBoxTooltip: Upload a video from your computer or select from uploaded files.

imageZoomScreen.zoomPositionTooltip: Zoom description position in presentation mode.
imageZoomScreen.seqDelayTooltip: The amount of time that elapses before a new sequence starts after the previous one ends.
imageZoomScreen.imageBoxTooltip: Main image zoomed over. In the zoom sequence table, you can add a new zoom point and place it on the image. In the table, select the zoom level and animation duration for this point of interest.

slideshowScreen.imageTransitionTooltip: The type of transition between individual images.
slideshowScreen.actualImageTimeTooltip: After this time has passed, the current image will move to the next image, or to the next screen if the current frame is the last in the sequence.
slideshowScreen.imageTransitionFadeInOutAndBlurBackgroun: A gradual discovery with a blurred background
slideshowScreen.imageTransitionFlyInOutAndBlurBackground: From left to right with crumpled background

photogalleryScreen.photoDescriptionTooltip: Any description for the given photo.

parallaxScreen.theLowestImageTooltip: The lowest layer of the image. Represents the objects furthest from the viewer. It is animated the slowest.
parallaxScreen.theTopmostImageTooltip: The top layer of the image. It represents the closest objects to the viewer. It is animated the fastest.
parallaxScreen.imageBoxTooltip: An image representing the selected layer. Each layer is represented by one image.
parallaxScreen.parallaxAnimationLabelTooltip: An image representing the selected layer. Each layer is represented by one image.

textScreen.textTooltip: The text content of the screen that will be displayed to the user centered and centered. Maximum length of 300 characters including spaces. The font size is adjusted automatically according to the length of the text.

imageChangeScreen.imageBeforeTooltip: Select the 'before' image from the document library. Attention, both images must be the same size to display correctly.
imageChangeScreen.imageAfterTooltip: Select the 'after' image from the document library. Attention, both images must be the same size to display correctly.
imageChangeScreen.animationTypeTooltip: Choose one of 5 options for how the image will transition into the next.
imageChangeScreen.initialRodPositionLabel: The initial position of the drag on the screen
imageChangeScreen.initialRodPositionTooltip: Choose one of the five options where the rod will initially be placed on the screen (relative to the previous choice).
imageChangeScreen.initialRodPositionStartOption: At the beginning of the screen
imageChangeScreen.initialRodPositionQuarterOption: In a quarter of the screen
imageChangeScreen.initialRodPositionHalfOption: In the middle of the screen
imageChangeScreen.initialRodPositionThreeQuarterOption: In three quarters of the screen
imageChangeScreen.initialRodPositionEndOption: At the end of the screen
imageChangeScreen.initialGradualTransitionPositionLabel: The starting position of the gradual transition
imageChangeScreen.initialGradualTransitionPositionTooltip: Choose one of the three options from where the gradual transition will start.

documentsTable.startScreenTableTooltip: Documents and files for the exhibition that will be displayed on the opening and closing screens.

imprintTable.imprintTooltip: A circulation item. Usually a person and their role in the project or other accompanying text.
